description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a retro-inspired design, featuring a smooth, rounded chassis in a muted pink color with dark gray accents. The main body arches over a large, deep mixing bowl that is dark gray and appears to be made of metal, likely stainless steel. The mixer head is integrated into the chassis and has a small slot or button on the top, possibly for speed control or attachment release. The base is wide and stable, with a circular platform that supports the bowl and likely houses the motor. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and high-quality plastic, with a glossy finish that gives it a sleek, modern appearance. No visible brand logo is present, and the control interface appears minimalistic, with only a single button or switch visible.
description: A retro-style pink and gray countertop electric mixer with a large metal mixing bowl and a sleek, rounded chassis. The design is minimalistic and glossy, with a single visible control button.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the mixer head, large metal bowl, and the main control button on the chassis.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the arched chassis and the back of the mixer, with the bowl partially visible.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the mixer head, bowl, and the smooth, continuous lines of the chassis.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the opening of the bowl and the front of the mixer head.
attribute_control_panel_type: single button or switch on top of the chassis, minimalistic layout
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded, arching form and integrated base
